_comment: NPC: Wang Ping (王平). Canon ID: N07. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Wang Ping

perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Same — mortal, but you sense his fragile health

note: Wang Lin's brother; tragic fate drives Wang Lin's early motivation

personality_traits._comment: INFERRED from canon: gentle younger brother, protective of family, willing to face hardship (fishing, firewood), worries but does not flee. Per Article XLI: general traits.

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Brother, Da Niu wants to go fishing at the south bend. Will you come? We could use the extra food.
Father has been quiet lately. The Teng family's tax collectors came again yesterday. We gave them half our rice.
If the Heng Yue elder tests us, I hope you pass. I will stay and take care of Mother and Father, but you... you could become someone.

sect_tasks.description: Wang Ping grins: 'Da Niu and I were going to fish at the south bend. If you bring us some string for lines, I will share whatever we catch. Mother could use the extra food.'
Wang Ping looks at the dwindling woodpile: 'Winter will be hard this year. Father says we need more firewood. If you bring oak logs, I can help you split them.'

desires.what: Follow Wang Lin to the hills to watch him practice
desires.why: Wang Ping is the youngest and curious. He idolizes his older brother.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1. Wang Ping is the youngest brother. Younger siblings follow older ones. No specific canon line, but universally human.
desires.line: Wait for me! I want to come too!
